arts.ttl: Napoli chief: We won't overpay for Garnacho
arts.sum: Napoli's sporting director Giovanni Manna spoke about the prospect of signing Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho ahead of his team's win over Juventus on Saturday, emphasising that the Serie A leaders won't over-extend themselves financially.

arts.ttl: Man United outcast Marcus Rashford ready to take massive step to force Barcelona move
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford is desperate for a move away from the club after being dropped by boss Ruben Amorim from the squad. The attacker has expressed his desire of a new challenge in his career after seeing limited playing time under Amorim. arts.ttl: In-demand Alejandro Garnacho travels down to London with Man United squad for Fulham clash, amid offers from Chelsea and Napoli
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho is part of Manchester United's travelling squad for their game against Fulham, amid speculation over his future.

arts.ttl: Antony joins Real Betis on loan until end of season
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony joins La Liga side Real Betis on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Man United forward Antony joins Real Betis on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony completed a loan move to Real Betis on Saturday that will keep him at the Spanish club for the rest of the season. Brazil international Antony was a $95 million signing from Ajax in 2022 and expected to be a leading light for United.
